title: Make a Correction - Faculty Version
content:
Make a Correction to a Submitted Form - Faculty Version
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for FACULTY AND STAFF use. It explains how to use "Service Request" to make a correction to a previously submitted form.

---

STEP 1: ACCESS SERVICE REQUESTS
From Websis Faculty/Advisor Self-Service, click "Service Request".

---

STEP 2: ENTER YOUR EMAIL
Enter your MSU email address and press continue. You will be redirected to Smartsheet.

---

STEP 3: SIGN IN AND LAUNCH DASHBOARD
Sign in with your Morgan credentials. You can launch one of the following dashboards:
- Office of Registrar Dashboard
- Service Request
- Launch Faculty Dashboard
- Launch Advisor Dashboard

---

STEP 4: LOCATE YOUR SUBMISSION
Find the request type you previously submitted and click on the submission to view details. For example: Enrollment Verification - Submitted.

---

STEP 5A: IF THE CURRENT APPROVER IS NOT THE FINAL APPROVER
You can make corrections or cancel the request. The available options will be visible in the details panel. Check the appropriate option, click SAVE, and refresh the page.

---

STEP 5B: IF THE CURRENT APPROVER IS "INSTRUCTOR" OR "ADVISOR"
This means the request has been returned to you (you will have received an email notification). The reason for the return is listed under COMMENTS/ACTION ITEMS. Review the reason and make the necessary corrections in the details field.

---

STEP 6: RESUBMIT
Click "I have made all necessary corrections" and save to resubmit the form. The request will re-enter the approval workflow.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Faculty Correction Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1fWJRukqtKxU_hHQBJS6uA7l4O7wYJkg5/view)
